STAPM Power Limit (W): Skin Temperature Aware Power Management (STAPM) Limit (W)
iGPU TDC Limit (A): Integrated GPU Thermal Design Current (TDC) Limit (A)
iGPU EDC Limit (A): Integrated GPU Electrical Design Current (EDC) Limit (A)
Intel FIVR Tuning: Intel Fully Integrated Voltage Regulator (FIVR) Tuning
FPS and low FPS values: Frames Per Second (FPS) and low FPS values
Static RTSS Frame Rate: Static RivaTuner Statistics Server (RTSS) Frame Rate
